name: Creamed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
Wash the mushrooms, remove the caps, and cut the mushrooms in half or into several pieces if they are large. Slice down through the cap and stem.
Lightly flour the sliced mushrooms.
Melt the butter in a heavy skillet over moderate heat. Add the floured mushrooms and brown gently.
As liquid cooks out of the mushrooms, pour it off and set aside.
When the mushrooms are well browned, add the milk or cream, mushroom liquor (the saved cooking liquid), salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir until the sauce reaches the desired consistency.
Serve on slices of crisp toast.
